summary: Regression test after code-review refactor (Header split into Logo/DesktopNav/Actions/BurgerToggle, new BurgerMenuOverlay, new hooks use-ui-effects.js, LeadMagnetCard with useUploadFlow, TestimonialLightbox, testimonials-data with stable id keys). Ran 61 UI/integration checks across desktop (1280x800) and mobile (390x800). 60 PASSED, 1 false-positive (text concat). All functionality 1:1 matches iteration_1 — no regression.
critical_code_review_comments: Refactor is clean: Header.jsx now 144 lines (down from 293), components are well decomposed (Logo/DesktopNav/Actions/BurgerToggle).
useEscapeKey hook works correctly — burger closes on Escape (verified).
useBodyScrollLock + useScrollPast hooks are reusable and properly cleaned up.
LeadMagnetCard's useUploadFlow hook correctly handles file change event with DataTransfer API; redirect element appears within ~500ms.
BurgerMenuOverlay uses stable keys (n.href) instead of indexes — verified in source.
testimonials-data.js exposes id fields for stable React keys — confirmed in code review.

Minor (non-blocking): one test assertion checked h1.textContent for 'Ответы на требования ИФНС', but text is split across multiple <span> with line breaks; textContent concatenates without spaces ('Ответы на требованияИФНС под ключза 2 рабочих дня'). Visually correct, semantically OK — just a textContent quirk. No bug.

success_rate.frontend: 98% (60/61) — 1 false-positive on textContent concatenation, not a real defect

context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor passed regression cleanly. All data-testids preserved. CTA hrefs (14 total to crm.fns.expert) — all are register or login, none undefined/empty. Hero h1 is multi-span (each line is own span); use innerText (not textContent) or sub-selectors if exact string matching is needed in future tests. Lead-magnet flow uses real File via DataTransfer + 500ms delay before redirect element shows 'Файл получен' + filename. Lightbox supports keyboard nav (ArrowRight/Left). Burger closes on Escape via new useEscapeKey hook. mobile-bottom-cta appears at scrollY>600 via useScrollPast(600).
